original_statement: how many yachts took at least 3 days to complete the race?
mutated_statement: how many things needed at least some days to do something?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Verb replacement/generalization + Quantifier vagueness + Event/context deletion: "yachts" → "things" | "took" → "needed" | "at least 3 days" → "at least some days" | "to complete the race" → "to do something"

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration 0中的judge_thought和simple_query的说明可见：agent 直接将“needed at least some days”对应到数据表的 elapsed time 列，说明“所有10条记录都满足”的结论（“Therefore, all 10 entries required at least some days” / “所有10行…因此答案是10”）。日志中没有出现任何关于问题模糊性、不确定性或澄清请求的表述，也没有使用ambiguous、unclear或需要更多信息等词语。agent 直接按自己的理解处理变异问题并给出具体计数结果，表现为把模糊问题当作明确问题来解答，因此应归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
